label: Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling

node.label: Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling
node.definition: Resolution and receptive field are changed by grouping, subsampling, or reconstructing spatial units.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling is to connect Images, video & spatial grids, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors to downstream capabilities including U-Nets & encoder–decoder convnets, Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models.
examples: substrate for Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Images, video & spatial grids, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.

dependencies.rationale: Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling uses Images, video & spatial grids as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling uses Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Convolution & local filters.

sentence_units.text: Resolution and receptive field are changed by grouping, subsampling, or reconstructing spatial units.

The role of Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling is to connect Images, video & spatial grids, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors to downstream capabilities including U-Nets & encoder–decoder convnets, Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models.
substrate for Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models
